self_improvement._note: Allowlist explicitly lists GENERATION + OPERATIONAL prompts. Self-improve pipeline must NOT edit measurement instruments — judge prompts, rubrics, library heuristics, schemas. See docs/design/self-improve-boundary.md (GC.1).

config_protection._note: P0.5 — rouge-safety-check.sh pre-write hook calls config-protection.js to flag weakening edits to linter/type/test/CI configs (strict:false, eslint-disable, lowered coverage, etc.) without a '// rationale:' marker. Modes: 'off' (skip), 'warn' (log but allow — default), 'block' (deny with reason). Fail-open: any check error allows the write.

eval_calibration._note: P1.18 — gates prompt changes to the judgment layer (02*, rubrics). `rouge eval-calibrate` reads library/gold-sets/product-eval/ plus model-produced labels and requires quadratic-weighted Cohen's Kappa ≥ min_kappa on every rubric dimension, across at least min_entries paired entries. Gold-sets are human-authored (blocklisted from self-improve). See src/launcher/gold-set-calibrator.js and library/gold-sets/product-eval/README.md.

capability_check._note: P1.21 — pre-analyzer gate that assesses whether Rouge's capabilities can produce a fix for each blocking finding before routing to milestone-fix. Set enabled:false for emergency rollback (pre-P1.21 behavior). Audit-recommender P1.13 remains active as the N=3 backstop regardless. See src/launcher/capability-check.js and capability-check-runner.js.
